item.action: Bound signed OIDC temporal claims before durable replay insertion so malformed expiry cannot create long-lived replay state.

progress.finding: Atomic uniqueness is insufficient when retention derives from unchecked exp. Validate exp, iat, and nbf under a bounded application profile before replay insertion and derive replay expiry only from validated claims.
progress.verification: 6 deterministic Node tests passed in an isolated runtime using byte-identical source and test content before commit.
progress.uncertainty: Default 600-second lifetime and 60-second skew are policy choices requiring validation against observed GitHub-issued tokens.

item.handoff: Cloudflare Research should insert temporal-profile evaluation after cryptographic, issuer, audience, and workflow checks and before atomic replay insertion. Use evaluator-derived accepted_at and replay_expires_at; fail closed on policy or storage errors.

reason: Shared queue state is maintained through additive projections to avoid overwriting concurrent team work.
